sources.expression: $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(comment_ID) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_approved = 'spam' AND comment_type = %s", $type ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT comment_id FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL %d DAY) > comment_date_gmt AND comment_approved = 'spam' LIMIT %d", $delete_interval, $delete_limit ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT m.comment_id FROM {$wpdb->commentmeta} as m INNER JOIN {$wpdb->comments} as c USING(comment_id) WHERE m.meta_key = 'akismet_as_submitted' AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL %d DAY) > c.comment_date_gmt LIMIT 10000", $interval ) )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT m.meta_id, m.comment_id, m.meta_key FROM {$wpdb->commentmeta} as m LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->comments} as c USING(comment_id) WHERE c.comment_id IS NULL AND m.meta_id > %d ORDER BY m.meta_id LIMIT 1000", $last_meta_id ) )
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE user_id = %d AND comment_approved = 1" . $comment_type_where, $user_id ) )

$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_author_email = %s AND comment_author = %s AND comment_author_url = %s AND comment_approved = 1" . $comment_type_where, $comment_author_email, $comment_author, $comment_author_url ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT m.comment_id FROM {$wpdb->commentmeta} as m INNER JOIN {$wpdb->comments} as c USING(comment_id) WHERE m.meta_key = 'akismet_as_submitted' AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL %d DAY) > c.comment_date_gmt LIMIT 10000", $interval ) )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT m.meta_id, m.comment_id, m.meta_key FROM {$wpdb->commentmeta} as m LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->comments} as c USING(comment_id) WHERE c.comment_id IS NULL AND m.meta_id > %d ORDER BY m.meta_id LIMIT 1000", $last_meta_id ) )
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE user_id = %d AND comment_approved = 1" . $comment_type_where, $user_id ) )

$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_author_email = %s AND comment_author = %s AND comment_author_url = %s AND comment_approved = 1" . $comment_type_where, $comment_author_email, $comment_author, $comment_author_url ) )
printf( esc_html__( 'An Akismet API key has been defined in the %s file for this site.', 'akismet' ), 'wp-config.php' )

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( __( 'Akismet re-checked and caught this comment as spam.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet caught this comment as spam.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet re-checked and cleared this comment.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( sprintf( __( '%s reported this comment as spam.', 'akismet' ), $row['user'] ) )
esc_html( __( 'This comment was reported as spam.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( sprintf( __( '%s reported this comment as not spam.', 'akismet' ), $row['user'] ) )
esc_html( __( 'This comment was reported as not spam.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet caught this comment as spam during an automatic retry.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet cleared this comment during an automatic retry.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet was unable to check this comment (response: %s) but will automatically retry later.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet was unable to check this comment but will automatically retry later.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet was unable to recheck this comment (response: %s).', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet was unable to recheck this comment.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet caught this comment as spam and updated its status via webhook.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet cleared this comment and updated its status via webhook.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet determined this comment was spam during a recheck. It did not update the comment status because it had already been modified by another user or plugin.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet cleared this comment during a recheck. It did not update the comment status because it had already been modified by another user or plugin.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'This comment was not sent to Akismet when it was submitted because it was caught by something else.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( 'This comment was not sent to Akismet when it was submitted because it was caught by the comment disallowed list.', 'akismet' ) )
esc_html( __( '%1$s changed the comment status to %2$s.', 'akismet' ) )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(comment_ID) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_approved = 'spam' AND comment_type = %s", $type )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet could not recheck your comments for spam.', 'akismet' ) )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT comment_id FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL %d DAY) > comment_date_gmt AND comment_approved = 'spam' LIMIT %d", $delete_interval, $delete_limit )

$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT m.comment_id FROM {$wpdb->commentmeta} as m INNER JOIN {$wpdb->comments} as c USING(comment_id) WHERE m.meta_key = 'akismet_as_submitted' AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL %d DAY) > c.comment_date_gmt LIMIT 10000", $interval )

$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT m.meta_id, m.comment_id, m.meta_key FROM {$wpdb->commentmeta} as m LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->comments} as c USING(comment_id) WHERE c.comment_id IS NULL AND m.meta_id > %d ORDER BY m.meta_id LIMIT 1000", $last_meta_id )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE user_id = %d AND comment_approved = 1" . $comment_type_where, $user_id )

$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_author_email = %s AND comment_author = %s AND comment_author_url = %s AND comment_approved = 1" . $comment_type_where, $comment_author_email, $comment_author, $comment_author_url )
esc_html( __( 'Akismet works with other plugins to keep spam away.', 'akismet' ) )

esc_html(
					_n(
						"This plugin you've installed is compatible. Follow the documentation link to get started.",
						"These plugins you've installed are compatible. Follow the documentation links to get started.",
						$compatible_plugin_count,
						'akismet'
					)
				)

esc_url( sprintf( 'https://tools.akismet.com/1.0/snapshot.php?blog=%s&token=%s&height=200&locale=%s&is_redecorated=1', rawurlencode( get_option( 'home' ) ), rawurlencode( Akismet::get_access_token() ), get_user_locale() ) )
esc_html( sprintf( _n( '%s missed spam', '%s missed spam', $stat_totals['all']->missed_spam, 'akismet' ), number_format( $stat_totals['all']->missed_spam ) ) )
esc_html( sprintf( _n( '%s false positive', '%s false positives', $stat_totals['all']->false_positives, 'akismet' ), number_format( $stat_totals['all']->false_positives ) ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Your current subscription is for personal, non-commercial use. Please upgrade your plan to continue using Akismet.', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/support/getting-started/free-or-paid/?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=commercial_support' ) ), $kses_allow_link )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'If you believe your site should not be classified as commercial, please get in touch', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/contact/?purpose=commercial&utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=commercial_contact' ) ), $kses_allow_link )
wp_kses( __( 'Your web host or server administrator has disabled PHP’s gethostbynamel function.', 'akismet' ), array_merge( $kses_allow_link, $kses_allow_strong, array( 'code' => true ) ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Please contact your web host or firewall administrator and give them this information about Akismet’s system requirements', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/akismet-hosting-faq/?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=hosting_faq_php' ) ), array_merge( $kses_allow_link, $kses_allow_strong, array( 'code' => true ) ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Your firewall may be blocking Akismet from connecting to its API. Please contact your host and refer to our guide about firewalls', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/akismet-hosting-faq/?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=hosting_faq_firewall' ) ), $kses_allow_link )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Please visit Akismet.com to purchase a new subscription.', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/pricing/?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=pricing_cancelled' ) ), $kses_allow_link )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Please contact Akismet support for assistance.', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/contact/?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=support_suspended' ) ), $kses_allow_link )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'You can help us fight spam and upgrade your account by contributing a token amount', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/pricing?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=upgrade_contribution' ) ), $kses_allow_link )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Please contact Akismet support for assistance.', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/contact/?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=support_missing' ) ), $kses_allow_link )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Please choose a free or paid plan so Akismet can protect your site from spam.', 'akismet' ), esc_url( 'https://akismet.com/pricing?utm_source=akismet_plugin&utm_campaign=plugin_static_link&utm_medium=in_plugin&utm_content=choose_plan' ) ), $kses_allow_link )
esc_html( __( 'Your API key is no longer valid.', 'akismet' ) )

esc_html( __( 'Your Akismet usage has been over your plan’s limit for two consecutive months. Next month, we will restrict your account after you reach the limit. Increase your limit to make sure your site stays protected from spam.', 'akismet' ) )

esc_html( __( 'Your Akismet usage is nearing your plan’s limit for the third consecutive month. We will restrict your account after you reach the limit. Increase your limit to make sure your site stays protected from spam.', 'akismet' ) )

esc_html( __( 'Your Akismet usage has been over your plan’s limit for three consecutive months. We have restricted your account for the rest of the month. Increase your limit to make sure your site stays protected from spam.', 'akismet' ) )

esc_url( sprintf( 'https://tools.akismet.com/1.0/user-stats.php?blog=%s&token=%s&locale=%s&is_redecorated=1', urlencode( get_option( 'home' ) ), urlencode( Akismet::get_access_token() ), esc_attr( get_user_locale() ) ) )
